full_description: FocusMode is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and avoid distractions during work or study sessions. It uses techniques like the Pomodoro timer to boost concentration. With FocusMode, you can customize your work intervals and breaks to fit your needs, track your progress, and set goals for yourself. The app also includes features like website blockers and phone silencers to minimize distractions. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone looking to boost their productivity, FocusMode is the perfect tool to help you stay on track and achieve your goals.
